meta.title: Brave New Industrie 4 0
meta.description:
Is Industrie 4.0 actually the 4th Industrial Revolution as touted by it's many proponents. Ralph Langner tackles that question in this 20 minute video from S4xEurope.

Ralph looks back at the characteristics of the three previous industrial revolutions (Steam Engine, Assembly Line, and Automation) and finds these lacking or different in "Industrie 4.0". It's a provocative video that made the attendees think about Industrie 4.0 from a different perspective.
